reference: I have a cholesterol level of eight point four. I am experiencing pain on my left side, which varies day by day. I had pain in the neck area that radiates to my left hand. If I raise my hand above my head, I get relief. Today, I am experiencing pain in my lower back on the left side and sometimes in my left testicle. I was born with one kidney, which functions normally. Please advise.
